name: frontend-editor
description: Use this skill when I ask for UI changes, new components, or frontend logic updates.

# Frontend Editor Instructions
Follow these strictly for all frontend tasks:
1. Use **Lucide** for all icons.
2. Use our shared **TheToastStack** for any notification logic.
3. Access all data via the existing **services** file.
4. Keep code clean and DRY.
5. **Restriction:** Do not trigger build scripts or tests automatically.
